concerns.text: Task T013 ('Implement data loader verification logic') is placed in Phase 3 (US1 Implementation). However, the Plan.md (Phase 0) and Spec.md (Edge Cases) mandate that data loader verification must occur BEFORE execution to fail-fast if datasets are missing. T013 should be moved to Phase 2 (Foundational) or Phase 0 to ensure the system aborts before attempting to run the benchmark logic in T014-T018.

Task T024 ('Implement internal consistency fallback logic') is placed in Phase 4 (US2 Implementation). The Plan.md (Phase 0) establishes that the decision to use internal consistency vs. external baselines is a feasibility check that determines the validation strategy. This logic should be part of the foundational metrics setup (Phase 2) or explicitly gated by a Phase 0 output, rather than being implemented as a late-stage feature within US2, to ensure the correct validation path is selected before running the 5 scenes.

Task T028 specifies generating 'Memory vs. Sequence Length' visualization. The Plan.md and Spec.md describe memory monitoring as a watchdog against a fixed 7GB limit per run, not as a variable dependent on sequence length during the subset run. Unless the benchmark explicitly varies sequence length (which is not in the scope of the 5-scene subset), the 'Sequence Length' x-axis data will be missing. The task description should be clarified to reflect the actual data available (e.g., 'Memory vs. Scene Index' or 'Memory vs. Time').
